0.desc_en: Landing body shots adds a stack of bonus +55% headshot damage to the next headshot for 10s. Max stack is 3.
0.desc_ru: Каждое попадание в корпус увеличивает урон от следующего выстрела в голову, совершённого в течение 10 сек., на 55%. Эффект суммируется до 3 раз.
0.perfect_desc_en: Landing body shots adds a stack of bonus +70% headshot damage to the next headshot for 10s. Max stack is 2.
0.perfect_desc_ru: Каждое попадание в корпус увеличивает урон от следующего выстрела в голову, совершённого в течение 10 сек., на 70%. Эффект суммируется до 2 раз.

1.desc_en: Killing an enemy with a critical hit grants +70% critical hit damage for 10s.
1.desc_ru: После убийства противника критическим попаданием, урон от критических попаданий увеличивается на 70% сроком на 10 сек.
1.perfect_desc_en: Killing an enemy with a critical hit grants +90% critical hit damage for 10s.
1.perfect_desc_ru: После убийства противника критическим попаданием, урон от критических попаданий увеличивается на 90% сроком на 10 сек.

2.desc_en: Killing an enemy repairs 10% armor over 5s. Headshot kills improve the repair by an additional 10%.
2.desc_ru: Убийство противника восстанавливает 10% брони в течение 5 сек. Убийства выстрелами в голову повышают эффективность ремонта на 10%.
2.perfect_desc_en: Killing an enemy repairs 15% armor over 5s. Headshot kills improve the repair by an additional 15%.
2.perfect_desc_ru: Убийство противника восстанавливает 12% брони в течение 5 сек. Убийства выстрелами в голову повышают эффективность ремонта на 12%.

3.desc_en: Weapon damage is increased by +3.5% for every 10% ammo missing from the magazine.
3.desc_ru: За каждые недостающие 10% боеприпасов в магазине агента его урон от оружия увеличивается на 3,5% (2% в PVP).
3.perfect_desc_en: Weapon damage is increased by +4.5% for every 10% ammo missing from the magazine.
3.perfect_desc_ru: За каждые недостающие 10% боеприпасов в магазине агента его урон от оружия увеличивается на 4,5% (2% в PVP).

4.desc_en: Gain 10% critical hit damage for every 0.5s you are firing. Stacks up to 5 times.
4.desc_ru: Повышение урона от критических попаданий на 10% за каждые 0,5 сек. ведения огня. Эффект суммируется до 5 раз.
4.perfect_desc_en: Gain 10% critical hit damage for every 0.5s you are firing. Stacks up to 8 times.
4.perfect_desc_ru: Повышение урона от критических попаданий на 10% за каждые 0,5 сек. ведения огня. Эффект суммируется до 8 раз.

5.desc_en: Killing a target within 7m grants +30% weapon damage for 10s.
5.desc_ru: Убийство цели на дистанции до 7 м. увеличивает урон от оружия на 30%. Эффект длится 10 сек.
5.perfect_desc_en: Killing a target within 7m grants +38% weapon damage for 10s.
5.perfect_desc_ru: Убийство цели на дистанции до 7 м. увеличивает урон от оружия на 38%. Эффект длится 10 сек.

6.desc_en: Critical hits add a stack of 3% reload speed bonus. Max stack is 40.
6.desc_ru: Каждое критическое попадание повышает скорость перезарядки на 3%. Эффект суммируется до 40 раз.
6.perfect_desc_en: Critical hits add a stack of 5% reload speed bonus. Max stack is 40.
6.perfect_desc_ru: Каждое критическое попадание повышает скорость перезарядки на 5%. Эффект суммируется до 40 раз.

7.desc_en: Amplifies +30% weapon damage to bleeding enemies. After 4 kills, applies bleed to the next enemy you hit.
7.desc_ru: Увеличение урона от оружия, наносимого противникам с эффектом кровотечения, на 30% (20% в PVP).После того как вы убьете 4 противников, на следующую пораженную вами цель будет наложен эффект кровотечения.
7.perfect_desc_en: Amplifies +35% weapon damage to bleeding enemies. After 3 kills, applies bleed to the next enemy you hit.
7.perfect_desc_ru: Увеличение урона от оружия, наносимого противникам с эффектом кровотечения, на 35% (25% в PVP).После того как вы убьете 3 противников, на следующую пораженную вами цель будет наложен эффект кровотечения.

8.desc_en: Amplifies weapon damage by 2% for every 4m you are away from your target.
8.desc_ru: Урон от оружия увеличивается на 2% за каждые 5 м расстояния до цели.
8.perfect_desc_en: Amplifies weapon damage by 2% for every 3m you are away from your target.
8.perfect_desc_ru: Урон от оружия увеличивается на 2% за каждые 4 м расстояния до цели.

9.desc_en: Hits grant a stack of +1% Accuracy and Stability. At 100 stacks, consumes stacks to refill the magazine.
9.desc_ru: Каждое попадание дает +1% к точности и стабильности. Эффект суммируется до 100 раз. После достижения этого количества эффект снимается, а магазин оружия заполняется боеприпасами.
9.perfect_desc_en: Hits grant a stack of +1% Accuracy and Stability. At 75 stacks, consumes stacks to refill the magazine.
9.perfect_desc_ru: Каждое попадание дает +1% к точности и стабильности. Эффект суммируется до 75 раз. После достижения этого количества эффект снимается, а магазин оружия заполняется боеприпасами.

10.desc_ru: Попадания в голову дают +20% к урону от навыков сроком на 15 сек.
10.perfect_desc_ru: Попадания в голову дают +25% к урону от навыков сроком на 15 сек.

11.desc_en: Headshots grant +75% status effect damage and duration to the next status effect you apply. Cooldown: 20s.
11.desc_ru: Попадания в голову дают +75% к урону от негативных эффектов и длительности следующего такого эффекта, наложенного вами. Восстановление: 20 сек.
11.perfect_desc_en: Headshots grant +75% status effect damage and duration to the next status effect you apply. Cooldown: 16s.
11.perfect_desc_ru: Попадания в голову дают +75% к урону от негативных эффектов и длительности следующего такого эффекта, наложенного вами. Восстановление: 16 сек.

12.desc_en: Weapon kills grant +1 skill tier for 15s. Stacks up to 3 times. Weapon kills at skill tier 6 grant overcharge for 15s. Overcharge Cooldown: 90s.
12.desc_ru: Убийства оружием дает +1 к уровню навыка сроком на 15 сек. Эффект суммируется до 3 раз. Если уровень навыка уже равен 6, то вы получаете перезаряд сроком на 15 сек. Восстановление перезаряда 90 сек.
12.perfect_desc_en: Weapon kills grant +1 skill tier for 19s. Stacks up to 4 times. Weapon kills at skill tier 6 grant overcharge for 15s. Overcharge Cooldown: 90s.
12.perfect_desc_ru: Убийства оружием дает +1 к уровню навыка сроком на 19 сек. Эффект суммируется до 3 раз. Если уровень навыка уже равен 6, то вы получаете перезаряд сроком на 15 сек. Восстановление перезаряда 90 сек.

13.desc_en: Amplifies weapon damage by 15% to pulsed enemies. After 4 kills, applies pulse to the next enemy you hit.
13.desc_ru: Увеличивает урон от оружия на 15% по отмеченным врагам. После 4 убийств применяет импульс к следующему пораженному противнику.
13.perfect_desc_en: Amplifies weapon damage by 20% to pulsed enemies. After 3 kills, applies pulse to the next enemy you hit.
13.perfect_desc_ru: Увеличивает урон от оружия на 20% по отмеченным врагам. После 3 убийств применяет импульс к следующему пораженному противнику.

14.desc_en: Hitting an enemy grants +15% skill damage for 5s. Using a skill or damaging an enemy with a skill grants +15% weapon damage for 5s. Damage increases are doubled while both buffs are active at the same time.
14.desc_ru:
Попадания по противнику дает +15% к урону от навыков сроком на 5 сек. Применение навыка или нанесение урона с его помощью дает +15% к урону от оружия сроком на 5 сек.
Если оба эффекта действуют одновременно, дополнительный урон удваивается.
14.perfect_desc_en: Hitting an enemy grants +20% skill damage for 5s. Using a skill or damaging an enemy with a skill grants +20% weapon damage for 5s. Damage increases are doubled while both buffs are active at the same time.
14.perfect_desc_ru:
Попадания по противнику дает +20% к урону от навыков сроком на 5 сек. Применение навыка или нанесение урона с его помощью дает +20% к урону от оружия сроком на 5 сек.
Если оба эффекта действуют одновременно, дополнительный урон удваивается.

15.desc_en: Destroying a Weakpoint grants 19% Weapon Damage for 15s.
15.desc_ru: Разрушение уязвимого места дает +27% к урону от оружия сроком на 15 сек.
15.perfect_desc_en: Destroying a Weakpoint grants 24% Weapon Damage for 15s.
15.perfect_desc_ru: Разрушение уязвимого места дает +32% к урону от оружия сроком на 15 сек.

16.desc_en: Landing headshots adds a stack of bonus +10% weapon damage for 5s. Max stack is 5. Additional headshots refresh the duration.
16.desc_ru: Каждое попадание в голову увеличивает урон от оружия на 10% сроком на 5 сек. Эффект суммируется до 5 раз. Дополнительные попадания в голову возобновляют действие эффекта.
16.perfect_desc_en: Landing headshots adds a stack of bonus +11% weapon damage for 5s. Max stack is 6. Additional headshots refresh the duration.
16.perfect_desc_ru: Каждое попадание в голову увеличивает урон от оружия на 11% сроком на 5 сек. Эффект суммируется до 6 раз. Дополнительные попадания в голову возобновляют действие эффекта.

17.desc_en: Critical hits have a 50% chance to return the bullet to the magazine. If a bullet is returned the next shot gains 40% increased damage.
17.desc_ru: При критическом попадании пуля с вероятностью 50% возвращается в магазин. Следующий выстрел после того, как пуля вернется в магазин, наносит на 40% больший урон.
17.perfect_desc_en: Critical hits have a 75% chance to return the bullet to the magazine. If a bullet is returned the next shot gains 50% increased damage.
17.perfect_desc_ru: При критическом попадании пуля с вероятностью 75% возвращается в магазин. Следующий выстрел после того, как пуля вернется в магазин, наносит на 50% больший урон.

18.desc_en: Magazine capacity is increased by 20%. Missed shots from cover have a 100% chance to return to the magazine.
18.desc_ru: Вместимость магазина увеличена на 20%. Пули не попавшие в цель при стрельбе из укрытия, с вероятностью 100% возвращаются в магазин.
18.perfect_desc_en: Magazine capacity is increased by 30%. Missed shots from cover have a 100% chance to return to the magazine.
18.perfect_desc_ru: Вместимость магазина увеличена на 30%. Пули не попавшие в цель при стрельбе из укрытия, с вероятностью 100% возвращаются в магазин.

19.desc_en: After killing an enemy with a headshot the next shot landed on any enemy will be a guaranteed headshot.
19.desc_ru: После убийства врага выстрелом в голову следующий выстрел по любой враждебной цели гарантированно станет попаданием в голову.
19.perfect_desc_en: After killing an enemy with a headshot the next shot landed on any enemy will be a guaranteed critical headshot.
19.perfect_desc_ru: После убийства врага выстрелом в голову следующий выстрел по любой враждебной цели гарантированно станет критическим попаданием в голову. Пока этот талант активен, он не будет срабатывать повторно при других убийствах.

20.desc_en: Amplifies weapon damage by +20% to enemies that are not targeting you.
20.desc_ru: Урон от оружия повышается на 20%, если вы атакуете врага, который не целится в вас.
20.perfect_desc_en: Amplifies weapon damage by +25% to enemies that are not targeting you.

21.desc_en: Killing enemies farther than 20m builds up stacks. Max stack is 3. Hitting an enemy within 20m will use all stacks to provide 20% amplified damage to enemies within 20m for 5s.
21.desc_ru: Убивая противников на расстоянии более 20м вы накапливаете заряды. Их максимальное количество 3. Попав впротивника на расстоянии 20м или менее, вы потратите все заряды и будете наносить +20% дополнительного урона врагам в радиусе 20м в течение 5сек.
21.perfect_desc_en: Killing enemies farther than 20m builds up stacks. Max stack is 3. Hitting an enemy within 20m will use all stacks to provide 20% amplified damage to enemies within 20m for 5s.
21.perfect_desc_ru: Убивая противников на расстоянии более 20м вы накапливаете заряды. Их максимальное количество 2. Попав впротивника на расстоянии 20м или менее, вы потратите все заряды и будете наносить +35% дополнительного урона врагам в радиусе 20м в течение 5сек.

22.desc_en: Receive +80% stability at the cost of -35% optimal range.
22.desc_ru: Повышение стабильности оружия до 80% ценой уменьшения оптимальной дальности на -35%.
22.perfect_desc_en: Receive +100% stability at the cost of -35% optimal range.
22.perfect_desc_ru: Повышение стабильности оружия до 100% ценой уменьшения оптимальной дальности на -35%.

23.desc_en: Reloading from empty grants +60% weapon handling for 10s.
23.desc_ru: После перезарядки с пустым магазином, эргономичность оружия повышается на 60%. Эффект длится 10 сек.
23.perfect_desc_en: Reloading from empty grants +80% weapon handling for 10s.
23.perfect_desc_ru: После перезарядки с пустым магазином, эргономичность оружия повышается на 80%. Эффект длится 10 сек.

24.desc_en: The top half of the magazine has 25% rate of fire and -25% weapon damage. The bottom half of the magazine has -18% rate of fire and +30% total weapon damage.
24.desc_ru:
Первая половина патронов в магазине увеличивает скорострельность на 25%, но снижает урон от оружия на -25%. Вторая половина патронов уменьшает скорострельность на -18%, 
но увеличивает урон от оружия на +30%.
24.perfect_desc_en: The top half of the magazine has 25% rate of fire and -30% weapon damage. The bottom half of the magazine has -18% rate of fire and +38% total weapon damage.
24.perfect_desc_ru:
Первая половина патронов в магазине увеличивает скорострельность на 25%, но снижает урон от оружия на -30%. Вторая половина патронов уменьшает скорострельность на -18%,
но увеличивает урон от оружия на +38%.

25.desc_en: Every 3 reloads from empty increases your base magazine capacity by 100%.
25.desc_ru: При каждой 3 перезарядке с пустым магазином его базовая емкость увеличивается на 100%.
25.perfect_desc_en: Every 2 reloads from empty increases your base magazine capacity by 100%.
25.perfect_desc_ru: При каждой 3 перезарядке с пустым магазином его базовая емкость увеличивается на 100%.

26.desc_en: Firing your weapon increases Weapon Accuracy by 1% and Weapon Stability by 1% per shot up to 60%. If you stop firing, the bonuses reset after 4 seconds.
26.desc_ru: При каждом выстреле из оружия его точность увеличивается на +1%, а его стабильность на +1%, вплоть до +60%. При прекращении стрельбы бонусы обнуляются через 4 сек.
26.perfect_desc_en: Firing your weapon increases Weapon Accuracy by 1% and Weapon Stability by 1% per shot up to 60%. If you stop firing, the bonuses reset after 4 seconds.
26.perfect_desc_ru: При каждом выстреле из оружия его точность увеличивается на +1%, а его стабильность на +1%, вплоть до +75%. При прекращении стрельбы бонусы обнуляются через 6 сек.

27.desc_en: Hitting an enemy with no armor grants +50% headshot damage for 5s.
27.desc_ru: Ранение противников, лишенных брони, дает +50% к урону от выстрелов в голову сроком на 5 сек.
27.perfect_desc_en: Hitting an enemy with no armor grants +50% headshot damage for 8s.
27.perfect_desc_ru: Ранение противников, лишенных брони, дает +50% к урону от выстрелов в голову сроком на 8 сек.

28.desc_en: If scoped, your first shot fired from out of combat or after fully reloading from empty deals headshot damage to any part of the body hit. Requires a Scope with 8x magnification or higher.
28.desc_ru:
Первый прицельный выстрел, совершенный в небоевой обстановке или после заполнения магазина, наносит урон от выстрела в голову при попадании в любую часть тела. 
Необходима 8х+ оптика.
28.perfect_desc_en: If scoped, your first 2 shots fired from out of combat or after fully reloading from empty deals headshot damage to any part of the body hit. Requires a Scope with 8x magnification or higher.
28.perfect_desc_ru:
Первые два прицельных выстрела, совершенный в небоевой обстановке или после заполнения магазина, наносит урон от выстрела в голову при попадании в любую часть тела. 
Необходима 8х+ оптика.

29.desc_en: After killing an enemy, gain 100% optimal range and +100% accuracy for 10s.
29.desc_ru: Убив противинка, вы получаете к оптимальной дальности +100% и +100% к меткости сроком на 10 сек.
29.perfect_desc_en: After killing an enemy, gain 150% optimal range and +125% accuracy for 10s.
29.perfect_desc_ru: Убив противинка, вы получаете к оптимальной дальности +150% и +125% к меткости сроком на 10 сек.

30.desc_en: Swapping to this weapon grants +300% weapon handling for 5s. Kills refresh the buff. Swapping away disables this from all weapons for 5s.
30.desc_ru: Переключившись на это оружие, вы получаете +300% к эргономичности оружия сроком на 5 сек. Эффект возобновляется после каждого убийства. В случае переключения на другое оружие он становится полностью недоступен на 5 сек.
30.perfect_desc_en: Swapping to this weapon grants +400% weapon handling for 5s. Kills refresh the buff. Swapping away disables this from all weapons for 5s.
30.perfect_desc_ru: Переключившись на это оружие, вы получаете +400% к эргономичности оружия сроком на 5 сек. Эффект возобновляется после каждого убийства. В случае переключения на другое оружие он становится полностью недоступен на 5 сек.

31.desc_en: Grants +18% weapon damage at the cost of -25% Stability and -25% Accuracy.
31.desc_ru: Урон от оружия увеличивается на 18% ценой снижения стабильности на -25% и точности на -25%.
31.perfect_desc_en: Grants +22% weapon damage at the cost of -25% Stability and -25% Accuracy.
31.perfect_desc_ru: Урон от оружия увеличивается на 22% ценой снижения стабильности на -25% и точности на -25%.

32.desc_en: For every 10 bullets in the magazine capacity, gain +3% rate of fire and +3% weapon damage for 9s when reloading from empty.
32.desc_ru: Зарядка каждых 10 патронов в пустой магазин оружия дает +3% к скорострельности и +3% к урону от оружия сроком на 5 сек.
32.perfect_desc_en: For every 8 bullets in the magazine capacity, gain +3% rate of fire and +3% weapon damage for 9s when reloading from empty.
32.perfect_desc_ru: Зарядка каждых 8 патронов в пустой магазин оружия дает +3% к скорострельности и +3% к урону от оружия сроком на 5 сек.

33.desc_en: Suppressing an enemy, that is not currently suppressed, grants +10% weapon damage for 12 seconds. Max stack is 4.
33.desc_ru: При подавлении противника, на которого в данный момент не действует подавление, вы получаете +10% к урону от оружия сроком на 12 сек. Эффект суммируется до 4 раз.
33.perfect_desc_en: Suppressing an enemy, that is not currently suppressed, grants +12% weapon damage for 12 seconds. Max stack is 4.
33.perfect_desc_ru: При подавлении противника, на которого в данный момент не действует подавление, вы получаете +12% к урону от оружия сроком на 12 сек. Эффект суммируется до 4 раз.

34.desc_en: 3 consecutive kills refills the magazine and grants +40% weapon damage for 10s.
34.desc_ru: После 3 совершенных подряд убийств магазин оружия заполняется, а урон от оружия увеличивается на 40% сроком на 10 сек.
34.perfect_desc_en: 2 consecutive kills refills the magazine and grants +40% weapon damage for 10s.
34.perfect_desc_ru: После 2 совершенных подряд убийств магазин оружия заполняется, а урон от оружия увеличивается на 40% сроком на 10 сек.

35.desc_en: Reloading grants +1.2% weapon damage for 10s. Stacks up to 25 times.
35.desc_ru: Перезарядка дает +1,2% к урону от оружия сроком на 10 сек. Эффект суммируется до 25 раз.
35.perfect_desc_en: Reloading grants +6% weapon damage for 10s. Stacks up to 5 times.
35.perfect_desc_ru: Перезарядка дает +6% к урону от оружия сроком на 10 сек. Эффект суммируется до 5 раз.

36.desc_en: Receive +3.5% Amplified Damage on the next shot with the weapon for each pellet that hits the target, if at least 6 pellets hit.
36.desc_ru: Нанесение 3,5% (2% в PVP) дополнительного урона при следующем выстреле из оружия за каждую дробинку, попавшую в цель, если в нее попало не менее 6 дробинок. Убийство противника дает +8% дополнительного урона при следующем выстреле.
36.perfect_desc_en: Receive +2%/3% Amplified Damage on the next shot with the weapon for each pellet that hits the target, if at least 4 pellets hit.
36.perfect_desc_ru: Нанесение 3% (3% в PVP) дополнительного урона при следующем выстреле из оружия за каждую дробинку, попавшую в цель, если в нее попало не менее 4 дробинок. Убийство противника дает +8% дополнительного урона при следующем выстреле.

37.desc_en: Killing a target has a +70% chance to refill the magazine.
37.desc_ru: Убийство цели даёт 70% шанс мгновенно заполнить магазин оружия.
37.perfect_desc_en: Killing a target has a +85% chance to refill the magazine.
37.perfect_desc_ru: Убийство цели даёт 85% шанс мгновенно заполнить магазин оружия.

38.desc_en: Swapping from this weapon within 10s of killing an enemy grants 30% critical hit chance and 30% critical hit damage for 15s.
38.desc_ru: Смена оружия в течении 10 сек. после убийства противника из этого оружия, повышает шанс критических попаданий на 30%, а урон от них - на 30%. Эффект длится 15 сек.
38.perfect_desc_en: Swapping from this weapon within 10s of killing an enemy grants 35% critical hit chance and 40% critical hit damage for 15s.
38.perfect_desc_ru: Смена оружия в течении 10 сек. после убийства противника из этого оружия, повышает шанс критических попаданий на 35%, а урон от них - на 40%. Эффект длится 15 сек.

39.desc_en: Hitting 30 headshots grants 20% critical hit chance and 50% critical hit damage for 45s. Hitting 65 body shots grants 90% weapon damage for 45s. Hitting 20 leg shots grants 150% reload speed for 45s. Buffs refresh when out of combat.

40.desc_en: Accuracy increases as you continuously fire, up to 30%. Headshot kills grant the Tenacity buff for 15s. The strength of Tenacity is increased by 1% for body shots and 5% for headshots.

41.desc_en: 40-80% of damage taken is delayed until the buff expires. All of the total delayed damage is reduced for each enemy killed while the buff is active, up to 100% with 3 kills.

42.desc_en: Shooting an enemy with this weapon will give 1 stack. At 100 stacks the next magazine will be 100% filled with shock ammo.

43.desc_en: When scoped, switches to semi-automatic fire mode, dealing 450% weapon damage. Headshots grant +6% headshot damage. Stacks up to 25 times. Once at full stacks, 10 stacks decay every 4s.

44.desc_en: Killing an enemy will apply a mark on every enemy within 20m. Max marks per enemy is 5. Marks disappear 10s after the last one. Deal +15% Amplified Damage per mark.

45.desc_en: Shooting enemies builds stacks to a cap of 40. Each stack grants 1.5% Skill Damage. For each skill tier gain 7.5% Weapon Damage.

46.desc_en: While holstered for 10s, weapon becomes Primed. Swapping to Primed weapon grants +25% Rate of Fire, +30% Weapon Damage and 100% more Threat for 20s.

47.desc_en: This weapon never needs to be reloaded. For every 100 bullets that hit an enemy, replenish ammo to you and all allies' reserves.

48.desc_en: Shooting marks enemies and adds stacks up to 50. Deploying a non-shield skill triggers effects based on stacks: 1-10 Pulse, 11-25 Disrupt, 26-49 Disorient, 50 all effects within 10m.

49.desc_en: Shooting heats up weapon. When the meter is full (50% mag size), rounds ignite enemies.

50.desc_en: Each kill gains a stack of 75% Base Magazine Size increase to the next magazine, up to 4 stacks.

51.desc_en: Hits apply a debuff dealing 100% weapon damage over 10s. Stacks up to 50 times.

52.desc_en: Dealing damage adds a stack of 2% Critical Hit Damage, up to 100 stacks, lasting 10s. On reload apply a 10s bleed to yourself.

53.desc_en: When you reload, rate of fire is increased by 25% for each enemy within 15m. Max stacks: 5. Kills refill 50% magazine.

54.desc_en: When moving, gain 4-8 stacks per second. Each round fired consumes a stack, amplifying damage by 75%. Kills grant +20% movement speed for 10s.

55.desc_en: When the agent has a Status Effect, 50% of the next magazine applies the same Status Effect.

56.desc_en: Melee attacks instantly kill non-elite enemies. Cooldown: 15s.

57.desc_en: Shooting applies venom stacks (10s). 2-Poison, 4-Disorient, 6-Shock, 9-Target takes 20% additional damage.

58.desc_en: Fires on trigger pull and release. If both hit, gain a stack. At 7 stacks, next shot deals 500% amplified damage and 500% explosion damage.

59.desc_en: Marks a random enemy. Hitting consumes mark for guaranteed crit with 20% amplified damage. Afterwards, all shots are guaranteed crits for 5s.

60.desc_en:
On trigger pull, fire both barrels at once.
When fired from the right shoulder, hits add offensive primers, and defensive primers when fired drom the left shoulder.
Hits from one shoulder will detonate all of the opposite shoulder's primers when present.
When detonated, each offensive primer deals 100% weapon damage, while each defensive primer grants +4% bonus armor and +10% amplified damage to armor plates for 5s.
Primer effectiveness is doubled at 10 stacks.

61.desc_en: Headshots build stacks (max 8). Healing allies repairs 50% damage per stack. Healed allies receive bonus armor. At max stacks, shots are guaranteed headshots for 8s.

62.desc_en: Shooting builds stacks (cap 20). Headshots grant 2. Each stack grants 2% Weapon Damage and 5% Headshot Damage. Reload grants temp armor based on stacks.

63.desc_en: Amplifies Weapon Damage by 125% to the highest ranking enemies in combat.

64.desc_en: Hits grant +2% weapon damage. Stacks up to 30. Headshots consume all stacks, repairing shield for 3% per stack.

65.desc_en: Each shot to a different target gives 1 stack (max 10). Each stack gives 20% weapon damage on weapon swap for 10s.

66.desc_en: Hitting an enemy applies a stack. At 5 stacks, enemy targets you for 5s and takes 25% more damage to armor.

67.desc_en: Flip a card when landing shots. After 5 cards, next shot amplified by 30%.

68.desc_en: Increases Dead Man's Hand damage bonus from 30% to 50%.

69.desc_en: Amplifies 1 extra shot when revealing your hand.

70.desc_en: +4% Damage Resistance for every enemy targeting you.

71.desc_en: Increase Stoic Damage Resistance bonus from 4% to 5%.

72.desc_en: Enemies targeting your Decoy also count towards Stoic bonus.

73.desc_en: Hits grant stacks. Reloading grants 2% handling and 4% WD per stack for 10s.

74.desc_en: Increases On Point Weapon Damage bonus from 4% to 7.2%.

75.desc_en: Increase On Point bonus timer from 10s to 15s.

76.desc_en: Each second out of cover grants 5% reduced skill damage. Max 50%.

77.desc_en: Increases Charger max incoming damage protection to 70%.

79.desc_en: Marked kills grant 3% WD and 2% CHD per contributor. Max 35 stacks.

80.desc_en: Increase Weapon Damage bonus per stack from 3% to 5%.

82.desc_en: On kill, spread status effects (10m) and refresh 50% duration.

83.desc_en: Increases range to 15m and refresh percentage to 75%.

84.desc_en: Amplifies damage to status affected targets by 30%.

85.desc_en: 25% of damage taken is repaired over 10s.

88.desc_en: 15% total damage when at full armor. Repair proximity allies for 60%.

89.desc_en: Increases Ground Control damage bonus from 15% to 25%.

90.desc_en: Increases Ground Control proximity repair from 60% to 120%.

91.desc_en: Skill use/cancel reduces other cooldown by 30s. +10% skill damage/repair.

92.desc_en: Increases damage and repair bonus from +10% to +25%.

93.desc_en: Decreases Feedback Loop cooldown from 10s to 5s.

94.desc_en: Hits on pulsed enemies add +1% bonus armor and +1.1% WD. Max 50.

97.desc_en: Consecutive headshots grant damage, armor, and magazine refill.

99.desc_en: Agents can miss one headshot before resetting cycle.

100.desc_en: 20% amp damage within 15m. Kills stack 5% damage (Max 5).

102.desc_en: Increases disorient radius on kill from 5m to 10m.

103.desc_en: +1 skill tier per ally in Hive/Smart cover range. Overcharge at Tier 6.

105.desc_en: Decrease skill destruction cooldown from 10s to 1s.

106.desc_en: Crits mark targets (Max 3). 60% damage shared between marks.

109.desc_en: Kills on marked status enemies grant Hollow-Point ammo (+20% damage).

111.desc_en: Increases bleed duration by 50% and damage by 100%.

112.desc_en: Turret spins 360 and explodes when disabled. Immune to own fire.

113.desc_en: Turret fire ignites other enemies within 2m.

114.desc_en: +25% WD to enemies on fire; +25% Turret Range.

117.desc_en: Repairs provide Bonus Armor up to 80% total armor.

118.desc_en: Interacting with skills grants +25% skill damage for 10s.

123.desc_en: Increases damage per stack from 0.65% to 0.9%.

124.desc_en: Instant: 50% bonus armor, 20% repair, up to 20% WD.

127.desc_en: Signature kill: 15% Sig Damage and 25% reload speed.

130.desc_en: Shooting builds stacks. +0.5% Handling and +4% CHD.

132.desc_en: Increase CHD per stack from 4% to 7%.

133.desc_en: Shooting cycles debuffs. Red (8% Amp), White (2% Armor), Blue (8% Reduction).

136.name_en: From the Shadows Into the Light
136.desc_en: Stacks grant Armor Regen (in cover) or Crit Damage/RPM (out of cover).

137.desc_en: Increases Max stacks (damage) from 50 to 100 and gain speed.

138.desc_en: Increases Max stacks (armor regen) from 50 to 100 and gain speed.

139.desc_en: Kill at ranges to build stacks. At 4 stacks, multi-bonus x1.5 for 15s.

140.desc_en: Double the weapon dmg bonus from Symphony.

141.desc_en: Decreases number of stacks needed for Symphony from 4 to 3.

142.desc_en: Killing an enemy adds and refreshes a stack of +12% bonus armor for 10s. Max stack is 10.

143.desc_en: You and allies within 15m of your deployed skills gain +30% reload speed and reduces active cooldowns by 0.6s each second.

144.desc_en: When you apply a status effect, it is also applied to all enemies within 10m of your target.

145.desc_en: Killing an enemy increases total weapon damage by 7% for 15s. Stacks up to 5. Grenade kills add 2 stacks.

146.desc_en: Applying a status effect increases total weapon damage by 18% for 27s.

147.desc_en: Applying a status effect to an enemy increases total skill damage and repair by 20% for 27s.

148.desc_en: Applying Blind, Ensnare, Confuse, or Shock to an enemy grants 50% of your armor as bonus armor to you and allies within 30m for 10s.

149.desc_en: When you are within 10m of an enemy, gain 23% bonus armor for 5s. Stacks up to 3 times.

150.desc_en: Increases total weapon damage by 25%. Taking damage disables buff for 3s.

151.desc_en: Skill kills increase total skill damage by 25% for 27s.

152.desc_en: Amplifies total weapon damage for 10s when swapping weapons. 45% for Shotguns/SMGs (15m) or Rifles/MMRs (25m). 20% for LMGs/ARs.

153.desc_en: Below 20% armor, crits repair 2.5% missing armor. On kill, crits repair for 4-10s based on Red cores.

154.desc_en: Kills from cover reduce skill cooldowns by 15%.

155.desc_en: Enemies hit with shotguns/MMRs take 15% amplified damage from all sources for 5s.

156.desc_en: Shooting an enemy increases total skill damage by 30% for 3s.

157.desc_en: Enemies within 3m of specific skills are shocked. Cooldown per skill: 8s.

158.desc_en: Using an armor kit grants +1 Skill Tier for 15s. Grants Overcharge if at Tier 6.

159.desc_en: Cover to cover grants 20% bonus armor (60% if near enemy) for 10s.

160.desc_en: Concussion grenades become Festive Grenades. Hitting an enemy causes explosions around two others within 20m.

161.desc_en: Within 10m of ally/skill, total weapon damage is increased by 20%.

162.desc_en: While holding bonus armor, gain 3 stacks per second (Max 10). Each increases WD by 4% within 10m.

163.desc_en: 75% chance to not consume armor kit. Spec kit bonuses increased 100%.

164.desc_en: Headshot kill grants next hit bonus damage equal to 150% of the killing blow for 30s. Cap 800-1250%.

165.desc_en: Deploying shield makes it invulnerable for 5s and grants 50% armor as bonus armor to allies for 20s.

166.desc_en: While in cover weapon handling is increased by +50%.

167.desc_en: All damage dealt amplified by 30%. All damage taken amplified by 60%.

168.desc_en: When armor is depleted, repair 100% of armor.

169.desc_en: After 8s in cover, increase ally WD and skill damage by 14%.

170.desc_en: Damaging an enemy with a skill increases total weapon damage by 18% for 20s.

171.desc_en: Skill kills have a 30% chance to reset skill cooldowns.

172.desc_en: Amplifies total weapon and skill damage by 20% to pulsed enemies.

173.desc_en: Blind on headshot, bleed on chest hit. Cooldown 20s.

174.desc_en: Grenade radius +75%. Refund on kill. Can be cooked. 15% bonus armor while aiming.

175.desc_en: Below 30% armor, headshots from cover repair 30% armor. Cooldown 2s.

176.desc_en: Increases total weapon damage by 6% every second while aiming (8x scope+), up to 60%.

177.desc_en: +40% bonus armor while reloading. Grants up to 30% armor to allies based on Blue cores.

178.desc_en: Thrown skills explode 1.5s after landing (5m). Explosions repeat every 5s.

179.desc_en: Critical hits increase total weapon damage by 1% for 10s. Stacks up to 24 times.

180.desc_en: Status effects apply snowfall to target.

181.desc_en: When dealing Weapon Damage to an enemy, 50% of the damage will be dealt to another enemy within 30m instead. When there are no enemies nearby, deal damage normally. Does not apply to Armor Plates.

182.desc_en: Status effects also apply a damage over time debuff for 10s. Total Damage dealt is equal to 50% of your concussion grenade damage and increased by your status effect attributes.

183.desc_en: Taking damage builds stacks to a cap of 30. Each stack grants 1.5% Weapon Damage. Taking damage at max stacks triggers a purge, removing status effects and dropping a healing cloud (5% Max Armor for 10s).

184.desc_en: Bonus based on distance of the last enemy hit. 0-15m: +25% CHD; 15-25m: +10% CHC and +10% CHD; 25m+: +25% CHC.

185.desc_en: Dealing/receiving status effects builds stacks (Max 12). Each stack grants +2% WD and +2% Status Effects. Stacks decay if no enemies nearby.

186.desc_en: If Primary and Secondary are non-exotic/named and same type, Secondary talent applies to Primary. No swap talents.

187.desc_en: Throwing a grenade refunds it and grants +1 skill tier (or Overcharge) for 15s. Cooldown: 60s.

188.desc_en: Revive speed +80%. Provides 50% damage resistance during revive. Successful revives provide +1 Skill Tier for 5s (Overcharge for 15s at Tier 6).

189.desc_en: Kills drop trophies. Short term (10s): 5% WD (Red), 10% Bonus Armor (Blue), 5% Skill Eff (Yellow). Long term (300s): +1% WD, +1% Skill Eff, +0.1% Regen per trophy. Max 30.

190.desc_en: Fulfills requirements for unlocking Gear/Brand set bonuses. Can unlock multiple sets simultaneously.

191.desc_en: +50% Grenade Radius, +35% Damage. Extra +25% damage per enemy caught. Regenerate grenades every 30s.

192.desc_en: Allies within 10m: +30% CHD, +15% Skill Eff, +2% Armor Regen. Skill within 10m: half bonus. Highest active.

193.desc_en: On armor break, ally gains 80% of your armor as bonus armor for 10s. Cooldown removed on specialization kill.

194.desc_en: Hits within 15m apply bleed. Repair 3-48% armor per second based on number of bleeding enemies (up to 5) within 15m.

195.desc_en: Grenade damage or melee activates Seeing Red: +25% total weapon damage and +100% melee damage for 20s. Cooldown: 60s (reset on melee/grenade).

196.desc_en: 15% Hive haste per tier. Detonating hive refreshes skill cooldowns and grants Overcharge for 15s. Ally cooldown: 120s.

197.desc_en: Amplifies Weapon Damage by 30% to the lowest ranking enemies (Tier 3).

198.desc_en: Swapping weapons cycles bonuses: 1. +20% RoF/WD; 2. +50% Mag/Reload. Active for 12s.

199.desc_en: Pistol holstered: gain stack every 0.3s (Max 100). Next shot deals +10% damage per stack and headshot damage.

200.desc_en: Shock stun reduced 50%. Shield melee +100%. Melee with St. Elmo's applies shock (5m radius with full set). Cooldown: 15s.

201.desc_en: Gain 3% skill damage per second on one skill (Max 10). After 10s at cap, stacks transfer to other skill.

202.desc_en: Explosion immunity. +3% total weapon damage per second stationary (Max 10). Stacks lost 10s after moving.

203.desc_en: Vaulting/Stationary/Status Effect grant 10-20% movement speed. 50% movement impairment reduction.

204.desc_en: Marked enemy deals 600% amp damage to you. You deal 20% amp damage to unmarked enemies.

205.desc_en: Cover-to-cover or vaulting reloads weapon and grants 25% bonus armor for 5s.

ignited.desc_ru: Увеличение урона от оружия, наносимого противникам с эффектом горения, на 25%. После того как вы убьете 4 противников, на следующую пораженную вами цель будет наложен эффект горения.
ignited.perfect_desc_ru: Увеличение урона от оружия, наносимого противникам с эффектом горения, на 30%. После того как вы убьете 3 противников, на следующую пораженную вами цель будет наложен эффект горения.
ignited.perfect_desc: Увеличение урона от оружия, наносимого противникам с эффектом горения, на 30%. После того как вы убьете 3 противников, на следующую пораженную вами цель будет наложен эффект горения.

surgical.desc_en: +15% critical hit chance for the first bullet in each magazine.

capacitor_exotic.desc_en: +5% weapon damage per skill tier equipped (up to +30% at tier 6). Resets on weapon swap.

eagle_bearer_exotic.desc_en: Kills grant a stack of +1% weapon damage (up to 50). Stacks reset on reload or weapon swap.

chameleon_exotic.desc_en: Hitting 30 body shots grants +20% weapon damage. Hitting 30 headshots grants +20% crit damage. Both can be active simultaneously.

agitator_exotic.desc_en: Perturb: While holstered, generates 50% less threat. After 10s holstered, primes the weapon. On swap-in: +25% Rate of Fire, +30% Weapon Damage, +100% threat for 20s. Swapping away early removes bonuses.

nemesis_exotic.desc_en: Marks a target on aim. Damage to marked target increases by 5% per 0.5s aimed (up to +50%).

pestilence_exotic.desc_en: Shots apply Plague of the Outcasts. Enemies with the plague that die spread it to nearby enemies.

ouroboros_exotic.desc_en: Every 10 bullets fired grants +5% weapon damage (up to +50%). Resets on reload.

scorpio_exotic.desc_en: Shots apply Bleed, Burn, and Shock. Enemies affected by all 3 take +20% weapon damage.

regicide_exotic.desc_en: Headshot kills create a 5m explosion dealing 400% weapon damage and applying bleed to all nearby enemies.

mosquito_song_exotic.desc_en: Hitting an enemy applies a stack (shared between players). At 5 stacks, the enemy forcefully targets the last player to apply a stack for 5s and takes +25% more damage to armor.

restrained_exotic.desc_en: +25% weapon damage for 20s after your shield is destroyed.

elmos_mark_exotic.desc_en: Shots apply Elmo's Mark. Marked enemies take +20% weapon damage from all sources.

back_and_forth.desc_en: Swapping to this weapon grants +10% Rate of Fire and +9% Weapon Damage for 10s. Swapping from grants +5% Rate of Fire and +4.5% Weapon Damage for 10s. Two instances do not stack.
back_and_forth.desc_ru:
Переключившись на это оружие, вы получаете +10% к скорострельности и +9% к урону от оружия сроком на 10 с.
Переключившись с этого оружия на другое, вы получаете +5% к скорострельности и +4.5% к урону от оружия сроком на 10 с.
Получение одной из этих групп преимуществ прекращает действие другой. Две копии этого таланта не могут действовать одновременно.
back_and_forth.perfect_desc_ru:
Переключившись на это оружие, вы получаете +13% к скорострельности и +12% к урону от оружия сроком на 10 с.
Переключившись с этого оружия на другое, вы получаете +5% к скорострельности и +4.5% к урону от оружия сроком на 10 с.
Получение одной из этих групп преимуществ прекращает действие другой. Две копии этого таланта не могут действовать одновременно.

perfect_back_and_forth.desc_en: Swapping to this weapon grants +13% Rate of Fire and +12% Weapon Damage for 10s. Swapping from grants +5% Rate of Fire and +4.5% Weapon Damage for 10s. Two instances do not stack.

cover_shooter_exotic.desc_en: Shooting from cover marks the target. Marked targets take +20% weapon damage from all sources. Mark lasts 5s.

bighorn_exotic.desc_en: Switching to full-auto mode grants +20% weapon damage and +20% rate of fire for 5s. Switching to semi-auto mode grants +50% headshot damage for 5s.

payment_in_kind_exotic.desc_en: Kills grant a stack of +5% weapon damage (max 10). Stacks are lost when you reload or swap weapons.

unnerve_exotic.desc_en: Shots apply Unnerve. Unnerved enemies deal -20% damage. Killing an Unnerved enemy grants +20% weapon damage for 10s.

breathe_free_exotic.desc_en: Kills grant +5% rate of fire for 5s, stacking up to 10 times. At max stacks, gain +50% weapon damage for 5s.

chatterbox_exotic.desc_en: Kills with a full magazine grant +20% rate of fire for 10s. Reloading within 5s of a kill refills the magazine from reserves.

bluescreen_exotic.desc_en: Shots apply a stack of Bluescreen. At 10 stacks, the enemy is disrupted for 5s and takes +20% weapon damage for 10s.

bullet_king_exotic.desc_en: Kills do not consume ammo from the magazine. Reloading removes this effect until the next kill.

iron_lung_exotic.desc_en: While aiming, shots deal +20% weapon damage. Shots that hit the same target within 1s deal an additional +5% weapon damage, stacking up to 5 times.

pakhan_exotic.desc_en: Kills grant +5% weapon damage for 10s, stacking up to 10 times. At max stacks, gain +20% rate of fire for 10s.

transfusion_exotic.desc_en: Kills repair 5% of your armor. Headshot kills repair 10% of your armor.

agonizing_bite_exotic.desc_en: Every 10th shot is a guaranteed critical hit and applies a random status effect. Shots that hit a status-affected enemy deal +20% weapon damage.

doctor_home_exotic.desc_en: Kills repair 5% of your armor. Headshot kills repair 10% of your armor and grant +20% weapon damage for 10s.

merciless_exotic.desc_en: Each shot applies a Primer. Shooting a Primed enemy with the secondary fire detonates all Primers, dealing 800% weapon damage per Primer.

ruthless_exotic.desc_en: Each shot applies a Primer. Shooting a Primed enemy with the secondary fire detonates all Primers, dealing 800% weapon damage per Primer.

geri_and_freki_exotic.desc_en: Kills grant a stack of +5% weapon damage (max 10). At max stacks, the next shot deals 500% weapon damage.

ortiz_assault_interface_exotic.desc_en: Shots apply a stack of Ortiz Protocol. At 10 stacks, the next shot deals 300% weapon damage and applies a random status effect.

full_stop_exotic.desc_en: Headshots apply a stack of Full Stop. At 5 stacks, the next shot deals 500% weapon damage and staggers the target.

in_plain_sight_exotic.desc_en: Kills grant Stealth for 3s. While in Stealth, the next shot deals +100% weapon damage and is a guaranteed critical hit.

high_priority_target_exotic.desc_en: Headshots mark the target for 10s. Shots against marked targets deal +20% weapon damage. Killing a marked target grants +30% weapon damage for 10s.

the_trap_exotic.desc_en: Shots apply a stack of The Trap. At 5 stacks, the target is immobilized for 5s and takes +30% weapon damage for 10s.

sandman_exotic.desc_en: Kills grant +20% weapon damage for 10s. Headshot kills extend this bonus by 5s.

capitulate_exotic.desc_en: Shots apply a stack of Capitulate. At 10 stacks, the target is disrupted for 5s and takes +25% weapon damage for 10s.

liberty_exotic.desc_en: Kills grant +5% weapon damage for 10s, stacking up to 5 times. At max stacks, the next shot deals +50% weapon damage.

whiplash_exotic.desc_en: Shots apply a stack of Whiplash. At 10 stacks, the next shot deals 300% weapon damage and applies bleed.

oxpecker_exotic.desc_en: Kills grant +10% weapon damage for 10s. Headshot kills grant +20% weapon damage for 10s.

perfect_stabilize.desc_en: +1% Weapon Accuracy and +1% Weapon Stability per bullet shot, up to 75%. Stopping shooting starts a 6s timer, after which bonuses reset.

perfect_on_empty.desc_en: Reloading from empty grants 80% weapon handling for 10 seconds.

perfect_killer.desc_en: Killing an enemy with a critical hit grants 90% critical hit damage for 10 seconds.

perfectly_near_sighted.desc_en: Receive 100% stability at the cost of 35% optimal range.

perfect_pressure_point.desc_en: Amplifies weapon damage by 20% to enemies under status effects. After 3 kills, applies a random status effect to the next enemy hit.

perfect_frenzy.desc_en: For every 8 bullets in the magazine capacity, gain 3% rate of fire and 3% weapon damage for 9 seconds when reloading from empty.

perfect_flatline.desc_en: Amplifies weapon damage by 20% to pulsed enemies. After 3 kills, applies pulse to the next enemy hit.

perfect_streamline.desc_en: Increase Weapon Damage by 47% when no Skills are on cooldown.

perfectly_overflowing.desc_en: Every 2 reloads from empty increases your base magazine capacity by 100%.

future_perfection.desc_en: Weapon kills grant +1 skill tier for 19s. Stacks up to 4 times. Weapon kills at skill tier 6 grant overcharge for 15s. Overcharge Cooldown: 90s.

perfectly_ignited.desc_en: Deal 30% weapon damage to burning enemies. After 3 kills, applies burning to the next enemy hit.

perfectly_close__personal.desc_en: Killing a target within 7 meters grants 38% weapon damage for 10 seconds.

perfect_optimist.desc_en: Weapon damage is increased by 4.5% for every 10% ammo missing from the magazine.

perfectly_in_sync.desc_en: Hitting an enemy grants +20% skill damage for 5s. Using a skill grants +20% weapon damage for 5s. Damage increases are doubled while both buffs are active.

perfect_precision_strike.desc_en: Killing enemies farther than 20m builds up stacks (max 2). Hitting an enemy within 20m uses all stacks to provide +35% Amplified Damage to enemies within 20m for 5s.

perfect_thunder_strike.desc_en: Deals 35% extra damage to shocked targets.

perfectly_strained.desc_en: Gain 10% critical hit damage for every 0.5 seconds you are firing. Stacks up to 8 times.

perfect_preservation.desc_en: Killing an enemy repairs 15% armor over 5 seconds. Headshot kills improves the repair to 30%.

perfect_immobilize.desc_en: Amplifies weapon damage by 25% to ensnared enemies. After 3 kills, applies Ensnare to the next enemy hit.

perfect_outsider.desc_en: After killing an enemy, gain 150% optimal range and 125% accuracy for 10 seconds.

perfect_unwavering.desc_en: Swapping to this weapon grants 400% weapon handling for 5 seconds. Kills refresh the buff. Swapping away disables this from all weapons for 5 seconds.

perfectly_measured.desc_en: The top half of the magazine has +25% rate of fire and -30% weapon damage. The bottom half has -18% rate of fire and +38% weapon damage.

perfectly_vindictive.desc_en: Killing an enemy with a status effect applied grants all group members within 20m 21% critical hit chance and 21% critical hit damage for 20 seconds.

perfectly_unhinged.desc_en: Receive 22% weapon damage at the cost of 25% stability and 25% accuracy.

perfect_sadist.desc_en: Deal +35% weapon damage to bleeding enemies. After 3 kills, applies bleed to the next enemy hit.

perfect_fast_hands.desc_en: Critical hits add a stack of 5% reload speed bonus. Max stack is 40.

perfect_overwhelm.desc_en: Suppressing an enemy grants 12% weapon damage for 12 seconds. Max stack is 4.

perfectly_steady_handed.desc_en: Hits grant a stack of 1% accuracy and stability. At 75 stacks, consumes them to refill the magazine.

perfect_soft_spot.desc_en: Destroying a Weakpoint grants 24% Weapon Damage for 15s.

perfect_rifleman.desc_en: Landing headshots adds a stack of bonus 11% weapon damage for 5 seconds. Max stack is 6. Additional headshots refresh the duration.

perfect_lucky_shot.desc_en: Magazine capacity is increased by 30%. Missed shots from cover have a 100% chance to return to the magazine.

perfect_perpetuation.desc_en: Headshots grant 75% status effect damage and duration to the next status effect you apply. Cooldown: 16 seconds.

perfect_sledgehammer.desc_en: Dealing damage with a grenade applies a mark on target. Targets with marks take 40% more damage to armor and -10% movement speed.

perfect_spike.desc_en: Headshots grant 25% skill damage for 15 seconds.

perfect_boomerang.desc_en: Critical hits have a 75% chance to return the bullet to the magazine. If a bullet is returned, the next shot has 50% increased damage.

perfectly_behind_you.desc_en: Amplifies weapon damage by +25% to enemies that are not targeting you.

perfectly_naked.desc_en: Hitting an enemy with no armor grants 50% headshot damage for 8 seconds.

perfect_reformation.desc_en: Headshots grant 80% skill repair for 15 seconds.

perfect_ranger.desc_en: Amplifies weapon damage by 2% for every 3 meters you are away from the target.

perfect_first_blood.desc_en: If scoped, your first 2 shots fired from out of combat or after fully reloading from empty deal headshot damage to any part of the body hit. Requires 8x scope or higher.

perfectly_determined.desc_en: After killing an enemy with a headshot, the next shot on any enemy is a guaranteed critical headshot. Killing an enemy will not retrigger the talent while active.

perfect_eyeless.desc_en: Deal 35% weapon damage to blinded enemies. After 3 kills, applies blind to the next enemy hit.

perfect_pumped_up.desc_en: Reloading grants 6% weapon damage for 10 seconds. Stacks up to 5 times.

perfect_pummel.desc_en: 2 consecutive kills refill the magazine and grant 40% weapon damage for 10 seconds.

perfect_brazen.desc_en: Receive +1% Amplified Damage on the next shot for each pellet that hits the target, if at least 4 pellets hit.

perfect_salvage.desc_en: Killing a target has a 85% chance to refill the magazine.

perfect_breadbasket.desc_en: Landing body shots adds a stack of bonus 70% headshot damage to the next headshot for 10 seconds. Max stack is 2.

perfect_finisher.desc_en: Swapping from this weapon within 10 seconds of killing an enemy grants 35% critical hit chance and 40% critical hit damage for 15 seconds.

future_perfection_mmr.desc_en: Weapon kills grant +1 skill tier for 19s. Stacks up to 3 times. Weapon kills at skill tier 6 grant overcharge for 15s. Overcharge Cooldown: 90s.

hidden_rock.desc_ru: Попадания в голову вызывают растерянность раз в 20 сек.
